cards.title: AI Terminology Glossary Clarifies Industry Jargon
cards.body: TechCrunch has published a comprehensive glossary defining key AI terms and phrases flooding the industry. The guide helps readers understand essential vocabulary in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

cards.title: AI Psychosis: When Companies Misunderstand Jobs
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie warns that decision-makers replacing jobs with AI often lack deep understanding of those roles. ClickUp's 22% workforce cut for AI agents exemplifies this disconnect.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M Pivoting to AI Inference
cards.body: Following Nvidia's $20B acquisition, chip startup Groq is fundraising $650 million while shifting focus from hardware to AI inference optimization. The company aims to refine how AI models respond to user prompts.

cards.title: Devin AI Coding Agent Shouldn't Replace Humans
cards.body: Cognition's Scott Wu clarifies that Devin, the leading AI coding agent, is designed to augment rather than replace programmers. The tool aims to enhance developer capabilities, not eliminate them.

cards.title: XCENA Chip Startup Raises $135M on Memory Theory
cards.body: South Korean chip startup XCENA has raised $135 million betting that memory, not compute, is AI's bottleneck. The funding validates alternative approaches to solving AI infrastructure challenges.

cards.title: Glean Surpasses $300M Revenue with AI Optimization
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean has tripled annual revenue by positioning cost-cutting as a major selling point. The company thrives despite competition from tech giants entering the category.

cards.title: Internet Infrastructure Redesigned for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are rebuilding cloud infrastructure for machine-generated traffic as AI agents move to production. The shift reflects AI's evolution from experimental to mission-critical workloads.

cards.title: Asana Acquires StackAI for No-Code Agent Building
cards.body: Asana has acquired StackAI to integrate no-code agent-building capabilities into its AI workflow suite. The acquisition strengthens Asana's enterprise AI offerings.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65B, Eyes IPO at $965B
cards.body: Anthropic has closed a massive $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion valuation in what could be its final private fundraise. The funding positions the AI leader for an anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI Token Futures Trading Emerges on Major Exchanges
cards.body: Large exchanges are designing derivatives around AI tokens, treating them as raw material inputs like electricity or bandwidth. The move signals AI tokens' evolution from computational outputs to tradeable commodities.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 with Dynamic Workflows
cards.body: Anthropic's new Opus model includes Dynamic Workflows for coordinating swarms of AI subagents. The feature enables more sophisticated multi-agent coordination.

cards.title: Musk Reframes Anthropic-SpaceX Compute Deal Terms
cards.body: Elon Musk publicly described the Anthropic compute partnership as short-term and cancellable, contradicting SpaceX's S-1 filing claiming payments through May 2029. The discrepancy highlights ongoing disputes over deal structure.

cards.title: Sesame Launches iOS App for Conversational AI
cards.body: Sesame, founded by Oculus creators, has launched an iOS app featuring natural conversational AI agents designed to feel like human interaction. The platform moves beyond traditional chatbot experiences.

cards.title: Apple's New Siri Redesign Challenges ChatGPT
cards.body: Leaked iOS 27 renders reveal Apple's plans for a redesigned Siri with a standalone app to compete with ChatGPT. The overhaul signals Apple's aggressive AI ambitions.

cards.title: RSI: New Focus Beyond AGI Race for AI Labs
cards.body: A new generation of AI labs is pursuing recursive self-improvement (RSI) as the next frontier beyond AGI discussions. The ambitious goal remains difficult to define and achieve.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Enters Safety and Deployment Phase
cards.body: Databricks co-founder highlights a shift in enterprise AI adoption: companies now focus on safe broad deployment rather than evaluating AI's potential. The maturation reflects enterprise AI's transition from experimentation to production.

cards.title: AI Terms Glossary Demystifies Growing Jargon
cards.body: The rapid rise of AI has created an avalanche of new terminology that can be confusing. TechCrunch breaks down definitions of the most important AI words and phrases you'll encounter.

cards.title: Company Leaders Struggle With AI Implementation
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie warns that executives pushing AI job replacement often misunderstand actual job functions. ClickUp recently laid off 22% of staff to deploy AI agents, exemplifying what some call 'AI psychosis.'

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M, Shifts Focus to Inference
cards.body: AI chip startup Groq is pivoting from hardware development toward AI inference optimization. The $650 million funding round reflects growing demand for refining how AI models process prompted requests.

cards.title: Cognition's AI Coding Agent Won't Replace Humans
cards.body: Scott Wu, creator of Devin—the most successful AI coding agent to date—insists the tool isn't designed to replace human programmers. The position challenges narratives about AI job displacement.

cards.title: XCENA Targets AI Memory Bottleneck With New Chip
cards.body: South Korean chip startup XCENA raised $135 million betting that memory, not compute, is AI's biggest limiting factor. The company challenges prevailing assumptions about AI infrastructure constraints.

cards.title: Glean AI Search Startup Hits $300M Revenue
cards.body: Enterprise AI search platform Glean tripled annual revenue despite competition from tech giants entering the market. Budget-conscious enterprises are increasingly adopting AI for cost reduction.

cards.title: Cloud Infrastructure Redesigned for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are rebuilding internet infrastructure to accommodate machine-generated traffic from AI agents moving into production. The shift reflects AI's transition from experimental to operational deployment.

cards.title: Asana Acquires StackAI No-Code Agent Builder
cards.body: Asana is integrating StackAI's no-code agent construction technology into its AI workflow platform. The acquisition expands Asana's capabilities for building AI-powered business processes.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65B at $965B Valuation
cards.body: AI startup Anthropic closed a massive $65 billion Series H funding round, nearing a $1 trillion valuation. The round could be the company's final private fundraise before an anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI Tokens Become Tradeable Commodity Futures
cards.body: Major exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, treating them as raw materials like electricity or bandwidth. The financialization reflects AI's evolution from software output to infrastructure input.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 Model
cards.body: Anthropic's new Opus model includes Dynamic Workflows, a tool for coordinating swarms of AI subagents. The feature enables more complex multi-agent AI orchestration.

cards.title: Musk Disputes Anthropic SpaceX Compute Lease Terms
cards.body: Elon Musk is reframing xAI's massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, contradicting SpaceX's own S-1 filing. The dispute highlights tensions around AI infrastructure financing.

cards.title: Sesame Conversational AI Launches iOS App
cards.body: Sesame, a conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launched its public iOS app featuring natural back-and-forth interactions. The app aims to feel more like human conversation than traditional chatbots.

cards.title: Apple Planning Major Siri AI Overhaul
cards.body: Apple is redesigning Siri for iOS 27 with a new standalone app and AI capabilities to compete with ChatGPT. New renders reveal Apple's plans to significantly enhance its AI assistant.

cards.title: RSI Emerges as New AI Research Frontier
cards.body: AI labs are focusing on recursive self-improvement (RSI) as the next frontier, but achieving sustained self-improvement remains elusive. The goal is proving as difficult to pin down as previous AGI aspirations.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Deployment Shifts to Safety Focus
cards.body: Companies have moved beyond evaluating whether AI is exciting to whether it's safe to deploy broadly. According to Databricks' co-founder, enterprise AI is entering a new maturity phase.

cards.title: Pope's Encyclical on AI Warns of Neutrality Myth
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's new encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' emphasizes that 'technology is never neutral,' calling for courage and solidarity in the AI age. The statement addresses critical concerns about AI's societal impact.

cards.title: AI Hype Gets Booed at College Graduations
cards.body: University of Arizona graduates booed Eric Schmidt when he told them to help shape AI's future. The reaction reflects generational skepticism about AI's promised benefits.

cards.title: Organizations Struggle With Agentic AI Transition
cards.body: While 85% of organizations want to deploy AI agents within three years, 76% say their infrastructure can't support it. A significant gap exists between AI ambitions and operational readiness.

cards.title: Limited Evidence AI Jobs Crisis Is Real
cards.body: Despite growing hysteria about AI's threat to white-collar employment, evidence remains scarce. MIT Technology Review provides a reality check on widespread AI job displacement fears.

cards.title: LLMs Stubbornly Believe False Information
cards.body: Research shows large language models believe false statements even after explicit warnings they're incorrect. The finding reveals a fundamental reasoning limitation in current AI systems.

cards.title: Developer Embeds Data-Nuking Prompt Injection
cards.body: A developer frustrated with 'vibe coders' secretly embedded a destructive prompt injection in their code. The incident highlights security risks from casual AI usage in development.

cards.title: Apple Embedding Gemini Model Into iPhone
cards.body: Apple is working to integrate a massive Gemini AI model directly into iPhones to power an enhanced Siri. The move brings advanced AI capabilities directly to device hardware.
